content.en: Narrator: It is 2026! Happy New Year! Crowd: Happy New Year!!
content.tw: Narrator: 現在是 2026 年！新年快樂喔！

content.en: Every New Year, many people try to do something for one year. They want to make a good change in their lives. Do you want to try this? Here are some ideas!
content.tw: 每到新的一年，都會有很多人許下新年新希望。為了讓生活變得更好，他們會訂下一個目標，並且持續執行一整年。你也想試試看嗎？

content.en: You can try to be healthier. How? Eat more fruits and vegetables every day! Or drink more water every day!
content.tw: 你可以試著變得更健康！你可以每天多吃一點蔬菜水果，或是多喝一點水！

content.en: Or play a sport you like every week. Or play a new sport! Join a team, make new friends, and feel great!
content.tw: 你也可以每星期都做你喜歡的運動，或是學一種新運動，加入球隊，認識新朋友。這樣不僅可以讓身體更健康，心情也會變好！

content.en: You can be neater. How? Make your bed every morning. Or give your old toys and clothes to kids who need them.
content.tw: 你還可以變得更乾淨整齊。例如每天早上折被子，或是把不用的玩具和衣服送給需要的小朋友。

content.en: You can help the Earth. How? Use less plastic. Or get a plant! Water it and watch it grow!
content.tw: 幫助地球也不錯喔！少用一點塑膠，或是種一盆植物，看著它長大。

content.en: There are other things you can do. Read one book every month! Or write what you think and feel in a notebook. Or try a fun hobby!
content.tw: 還有很多別的新年新希望，像是每個月讀一本書，寫寫日記記錄你的想法跟感受，或者培養新的興趣！

content.en: Try something that will make a good change in your life. Do it a lot in 2026! You will feel good and have a happier year!
content.tw: 試著做些能讓你的生活有良好改變的事吧。在2026年多多努力實踐！你會感覺良好並擁有更快樂的一年！

vocabulary.preface: 新的一年來臨，你可以決心做很多新的事。

content.text:
1. want 想要.
What's your New Year's resolution, Nancy? 你的新年決心是什麼，南西?
I want to learn how to say "thank you" in 10 languages!

2. join 加入.
And I'll join a group of hot pot eaters!
That sounds…not so healthy.

3. every month 每個月.
Oh, we'll only get together once every month, I think.
What about you? 你呢?

4. change 改變.
I'll make a good change in my life.
By doing what…?
By feeling great about me!

vocabulary.postscript: 新年你想做什麼呢? want想要 join加入 every month每個月 change改變

quiz.question: 1. How can you try to be healthier this year?
2. How can you be neater this year?
3. How can you help the Earth?

content.en: Taoyuan has a new library. It has 23,000 books. And it has robots and self-driving vehicles!
content.tw: 桃園有一間新的圖書館。這間圖書館有兩萬三千本書，而且還有機器人跟自動駕駛車！

content.en: But the robots are not robots with a head, arms, and legs. They are robot arms!
content.tw: 不過，這些機器人不是完整的機器人，而是機械手臂！

content.en: These robot arms move. And they see! They see with cameras. The arms can find books on shelves. The arms work with the self-driving vehicles. They work together using AI.
content.tw: 這些機械手臂不但會動，還看得見。它們的眼睛是攝影機，可以找到書架上的書。機械手臂跟自駕車靠著人工智慧合作無間。

content.en: At this library, people can choose books online. The robot arms find the books. They pick up the books. They put them on the self-driving vehicles. Then the vehicles take the books to the book pickup place. People get the books and take them home. This is so easy!
content.tw: 想要在這間圖書館借書，可以先在網路上選好，機械手臂會在圖書館裡找書，把書拿起來放到自駕車送到取書口，借書人就能把書帶回家，真的很方便！

content.en: The robot arms and self-driving vehicles also work to put books back on shelves. They do this at night. No one is in the library then.
content.tw: 機械手臂跟自駕車也會在晚上合作把書本放回書架，那時候圖書館裡沒人，不受干擾。

content.en: Taoyuan wants robot arms and self-driving vehicles in more libraries. Maybe more cities will get them too. So maybe you will see them in your library one day!
content.tw: 桃園希望在更多圖書館引進機械手臂和自駕車。也許更多城市也會有。所以也許有一天你會在自己的圖書館看到它們！

vocabulary.preface: 神奇的機器手臂和自駕車，大大減少圖書館所需要的人力。

content.text:
1. get 得到.
I'm so hungry! 我好餓! When is the food coming? 什麼時候才上菜?
Here it comes! 來了! Isn't it fun to get your food from a robot?
由機器人送餐是不是很好玩?
I'd say it's a bit scary.我覺得有點恐怖.

2. arm 手臂，leg 腿。
Luckily, it doesn't have arms and legs. 還好它沒有手臂跟腿。
Yeah, I certainly don't want it touching my plates.對，我可不要它碰我的盤子。

3. take 拿。
Now what? 現在是怎樣? Why is it just standing here? 它為什麼就站在這裡?
I think it wants to take your plate.我想它要拿你的盤子。

4. can 能夠。How did it know I'm done? 它怎麼知道我吃完了?
Maybe it can see from far away? 也許它老遠就能看到?
Now that's scary! 那真的很恐怖!

vocabulary.postscript: 你想得到機器人的服務嗎? get得到 arm手臂, leg腿 take拿 can能夠

quiz.question: 1. What does the library in Taoyuan have?
2. What do the robots do when people choose books online?
3. When do the robots put books back on shelves?

content.en: Kiwis are birds. They have long beaks and soft feathers. They are the same size as chickens. They cannot fly. Kiwis live in New Zealand. They do not live in other countries.
content.tw: 奇異鳥有長長的嘴巴跟柔軟的羽毛。牠們跟雞差不多大，也不會飛行。只有在紐西蘭才見得到奇異鳥喔！

content.en: People in New Zealand love kiwis. Many people there call themselves "Kiwis"!
content.tw: 紐西蘭人很喜歡奇異鳥，所以很多人會叫自己「奇異人」！

content.en: But there are not many kiwi birds now. They need help. Many other birds in New Zealand need help too.
content.tw: 但是，奇異鳥的數量變少了，而且也有很多其他的鳥類面臨一樣的困境。這些鳥需要大家幫忙！

content.en: Two small animals are not good for them. Rats and possums eat bird eggs and baby birds. Possums also eat lots of leaves, flowers, and fruit. Now birds have fewer places to live. They also have less food.
content.tw: 大老鼠跟澳洲袋貂會吃鳥蛋跟雛鳥！袋貂也會吃很多樹葉、花跟水果。這樣一來，鳥能住的地方跟能吃的食物都變少了。

content.en: Long ago, New Zealand had no rats or possums. They came from other countries. Now people in New Zealand want to catch all of them.
content.tw: 大老鼠跟袋貂是從其他國家來的外來種，紐西蘭人希望把牠們全部抓起來，保護鳥類！

content.en: Grownups and kids want to help kiwis and other birds. So they put rat and possum traps in gardens, parks, and forests.
content.tw: 大人跟小孩都一起幫忙，在花園、公園跟森林裡放陷阱捕捉大老鼠跟袋貂！

content.en: The birds need more help. There are many rats and possums to catch. But now people in New Zealand see more kiwis and other birds! Kiwis are saving kiwis!
content.tw: 鳥類需要更多的幫助。還有很多大老鼠和袋貂需要捕捉。但現在紐西蘭人看到了更多的奇異鳥和其他鳥類！奇異鳥正在拯救奇異鳥！

vocabulary.preface: 紐西蘭獨特的奇異鳥，遭到別的動物威脅。

content.text:
1. bird 鳥類.
Will you go shopping with me tomorrow? 你明天會跟我去購物嗎?
No, sorry. I'm going bird watching. 不行，真抱歉，我要去賞鳥。
Again? You just went last week. 又要去? 你上星期才去過。

2. forest 森林.
We'll see different birds. 是看不同的鳥。This time we'll go to a national forest. 這次我們要去國家森林區。

3. feather 羽毛.
What's so special about birds, anyway? 鳥兒究竟有什麼特別?
They are very cute. 牠們很可愛。And their colorful feathers shine under the sun. 彩色羽毛在太陽底下會閃閃發光。

4. catch 捕捉.
Have you tried to catch them? 你有沒有抓過牠們?
I only try to catch them with my camera. 我只用相機捕捉。I hope they always stay there. 我希望牠們永遠在那裏。

vocabulary.postscript: 請跟我讀今天的單字。bird鳥類 forest森林 feather羽毛 catch捕捉

quiz.question: 1. Why do kiwis need help?
2. Where did rats come from long ago?
3. Where do people put traps?

content.en: Ice sheets are very big and thick ice. They are not in an ocean. They are on land.
content.tw: 陸地上的冰原是厚厚的大冰塊構成的！

content.en: The Earth has two ice sheets. The bigger one is in Antarctica. The smaller one is in Greenland.
content.tw: 地球上有兩大冰原，最大的冰原在南極洲，另一個比較小的則在格陵蘭。

content.en: Greenland's ice sheet is the size of 47 Taiwans! It is three kilometers thick in some places!
content.tw: 格陵蘭冰原有 47 個台灣那麼大。有些地方甚至有三公里那麼厚！

content.en: A man went camping with some people on Greenland's ice sheet. The ice has lots of big, deep cracks. No one wanted to fall into a crack! Sometimes the group used a rope for safety. They walked together very carefully!
content.tw: 有一名男子跟夥伴一起到格陵蘭冰原露營。冰上有很多又深又大的裂縫，大家都很怕掉進去。他們都抓著繩子，小心翼翼往前走。

content.en: The man also helped pull a very heavy sled. Food, tents, and camping things were on it. They fell off a lot!
content.tw: 這名男子還要幫忙拉很重的雪橇，上面裝滿食物、帳篷跟露營用具。雪橇上的東西還常常會掉下來！

content.en: The man tried swimming in icy water. He had fun!
content.tw: 他甚至還跑到冰水裡游泳。雖然很冷，但他覺得很好玩！

content.en: But the man also saw that this ice sheet is getting smaller. Scientists say 150 million liters of its ice become water every minute! They say it is because the Earth is getting warmer. This water makes our oceans higher.
content.tw: 他也發現冰原正在慢慢變小。科學家說，每一分鐘就有一億五千萬公升的冰融化成水。地球暖化讓冰原融化，也讓海平面慢慢升高。

content.en: Let's take care of the Earth and try to keep the ice sheets!
content.tw: 讓我們一起愛護地球，努力保護冰原吧！

vocabulary.preface: 在格陵蘭厚厚的冰塊上露營，是非常特別的經驗。

content.text:
1. icy 冰冷的.
Is it a good idea to go camping in this weather? 這種天氣去露營是好主意嗎?
Of course! It's only fun when it's icy cold. 當然，要冰冷天氣才好玩。

2. thick 厚厚的.
Otherwise, the snow just melts as soon as it hits the ground.
要不然雪一碰到地面就化了。
If you want to see thick snow, 你要是想看厚厚的雪，you'll have to go higher.
就得去更高的地方。

3. tent 帳篷.
But the road could be closed. 但是道路可能會封閉。
Then you can set up your tent on the roadside. 那你們就可以在路邊搭帳篷了。

4. lots of 很多的.
Hey, you're right! 你說得對! That would be lots of fun! 那會超好玩的。

vocabulary.postscript:
你喜歡露營嗎? 來讀單字。
icy冰冷的 thick厚厚的 tent帳篷 lots of很多的

quiz.question: 1. Where did the man go camping?
2. What did the group use for safety?
3. What was on the sled?

title: Power Bank Fire Safety from Experts

content.en: Many people use their phones a lot. They use them all day. Sometimes their phones need more power.
content.tw: 很多人一整天都在滑手機，所以他們的手機需要時常充電！

content.en: So some people use power banks. Power banks give their phones power. But sometimes power banks catch on fire!
content.tw: 有一些人會用行動電源幫手機充電。但行動電源有時候會起火，造成危險。

content.en: Be careful when a power bank is very hot. Be very careful when it has smoke or a burning smell. Do not touch the power bank! Find a grownup fast! Your mom, your dad, or a teacher!
content.tw: 行動電源假如變得很燙，就要提高警覺。要是有冒煙或燒焦的氣味，就更要小心喔！這個時候千萬不要去碰行動電源！應該要馬上告訴大人，像是爸爸、媽媽或老師。

content.en: But maybe the grownup does not know what to do! Tell them what experts say. They say do not use a fire extinguisher. It will make more smoke!
content.tw: 如果大人也不知道該怎麼辦，你可以告訴他們專家的建議。專家說不要用滅火器，因為這樣會讓行動電源產生更多煙。

content.en: Experts say to take a smoking or burning power bank outside fast! Then put it into water. The water will bubble. Experts say to keep the power bank in the water for a week. Wait for no more bubbles.
content.tw: 專家說要趕快把冒煙或起火的行動電源拿到室外，然後泡進水裡。之後，水會開始冒泡。專家說要把行動電源泡在水裡一個星期，或是到完全沒有泡泡為止。

content.en: Then experts say to give the burned power bank to a sanitation worker. The worker can safely throw it away.
content.tw: 最後，要把燒壞的行動電源交給清潔隊，讓他們安全的處理掉！

content.en: Power banks are helpful. But when a power bank has smoke or a burning smell, tell a grownup fast!
content.tw: 行動電源很方便。但是當行動電源冒煙或有燒焦味時，要趕快告訴大人！

vocabulary.preface: 行動電源用起來很方便，卻有起火燃燒的風險。

content.text:
1. fire 火。
Hi, it’s Nancy. I’m going to be late. 嗨，我是南西，我會遲到。
Did something happen? 出了什麼事嗎?
Yeah, our train stopped because of a fire. 對，我們的火車停了，因為火災。

2. power 電力。
A fire? Are you okay? 火災? 你還好嗎?
I’m fine. 我很好。
But they’ve cut off the power so we’re stuck here.
但是他們切斷了電源，所以我們卡在這裡。

3. burn 燃燒。
Oh my god! Is the train still burning? 天哪，火車還在燒嗎?
No no, just smoke. 只有冒煙。

4. careful 小心的。
We’re all safe. 我們都很安全。
Good. Now you be careful, okay? 很好，你要小心喔。
Okay. Bye.

vocabulary.postscript:
來一起複習今天的單字。
fire火 power電力 burn燃燒 careful小心的

quiz.question: 1. Where do experts say to take a smoking power bank?
2. What do experts say to use for a smoking power bank?
3. What can a sanitation worker do with a burned power bank?

content.en: Taiwan has many Indigenous groups. Keeping their ways of life is important for Taiwan.
content.tw: 台灣有很多原住民，保留他們的生活方式很重要。

content.en: Now, about ninety schools are working with local Indigenous groups. They want kids to understand Indigenous ways of life.
content.tw: 目前大約九十所學校跟當地原住民族合作，希望讓小朋友更了解他們。

content.en: These schools have Indigenous houses with Indigenous art, tools, and stories. Kids learn by doing.
content.tw: 這些學校有原住民的傳統房子，裡面有各種手工藝、工具和故事。小朋友可以親身體驗原住民文化。

content.en: Taoyuan's Guanghua Elementary School has Atayal houses. Atayal people helped build them. Kids learn Atayal ways.
content.tw: 桃園的光華國小有泰雅族的房子，讓小朋友們在那裡學習泰雅族的生活方式。這些房子是泰雅族人一起幫忙蓋的。

content.en: Hualien's Taiping Elementary School has a Bunun stone house. The school used Bunun ways to build it. Kids learn Bunun ways.
content.tw: 花蓮的太平國小有布農族石板屋，是用傳統方式蓋的，學生可以更了解布農族。

content.en: Hualien's Ruibei Elementary School has a Bunun and Amis house. Bunun and Amis groups built it together. The art, tools, and stories are from both. Kids learn the languages, crafts, songs, and dances of both. Kids see the two groups work together and respect each other.
content.tw: 花蓮的瑞北國小有一棟布農族跟阿美族一起蓋的房子，裡面展示兩族的作品跟其他的東西。小朋友學習他們的語言和文化，也看到不同族群怎麼互相尊重與合作。

content.en: Kids at these schools understand Indigenous ways more now. Does your school have an Indigenous house?
content.tw: 這些學校的孩子現在對原住民文化有了更多的了解。你的學校有原住民傳統屋嗎？

vocabulary.preface: 台灣很多國小教導兒童原住民文化，希望讓它延續。

content.text: 1. understand 了解。Did you understand what she said? 你聽懂她在講什麼嗎?Not at all. 完全不懂。Was she speaking Chinese? 她在講中文嗎?I believe so. 我想是。
2. language 語言。I thought it’s another language. 我還以為是在講另外一種話。Yeah, Chinese can be hard. 對啊，中文是滿難的。
3. way of life 生活方式。I think when learning a new language, 我覺得學一種新語言,you need to learn their way of life. 也需要學他們的生活方式。
4. help 幫助。I agree. 我同意。When I was learning Japanese, 我學日文時,I ate raw fish every day. 每天吃生的魚。Did it help? 有幫助嗎?No. 沒有。

vocabulary.postscript: 你想學新的語言嗎? 來讀單字。understand了解 language語言 way of life生活方式 help幫助

quiz.question: 1. Where is the school with Atayal houses?
2. What is the Bunun house made of?
3. What do all of the houses have?

title: Thieves in Spain Steal Many Chairs

content.en: Narrator: Thieves take other people's things. Taking other people's things is stealing. Thieves steal many kinds of things. They steal cars! They steal bikes! They steal money!
content.tw: 小偷會偷汽車，腳踏車，也會偷錢。

content.en: In Spain, seven thieves worked together. They stole something different. They stole … chairs?! In two months, they stole one thousand one hundred chairs! And the chairs were not new!
content.tw: 西班牙有七名小偷一起偷東西，偷的東西很特別。兩個月之內他們偷了1,100張舊椅子！

content.en: The thieves stole chairs from 18 restaurants. These restaurants had tables and chairs outside. In Spain, many people like to eat outside and enjoy the weather.
content.tw: 這些椅子來自18家餐廳。在西班牙，很多人喜歡坐在室外吃飯、享受好天氣。因此餐廳會在店外擺放桌椅，讓客人在戶外用餐。

content.en: After these restaurants closed at night, they kept their tables and chairs outside. Some put chains on the chairs. But the chains did not stop the seven thieves! Then these restaurants had tables outside, but no chairs! Oh no!
content.tw: 餐廳晚上打烊後不會把桌椅收起來。有些餐廳會用鐵鍊把椅子鎖住，但是擋不住小偷。結果，那些椅子全被偷了，只剩下桌子！

content.en: The thieves sold the chairs in Spain and other countries. Together, the chairs were worth more than two million Taiwan dollars!
content.tw: 小偷把這些椅子賣到很多不同國家，總共賣了超過兩百萬台幣。

content.en: But the police caught the thieves! Police: Don't move! Narrator: They say the seven thieves worked in a big group of thieves.
content.tw: 警察逮到這些小偷後，發現他們其實屬於一個更大的偷竊集團！

content.en: Stealing things is not good. But thieves steal. Be careful about your things!
content.tw: 偷東西是不好的行為。但是小偷會偷東西。要小心保管你的物品！

vocabulary.preface: 這些竊賊只偷椅子，其他的不拿。

content.text:
1. steal 偷竊。
Have you ever had anything stolen by a thief? 你有沒有被小偷偷過東西?
Yes! When I was little, I had a dog named "Deli."
有，我小時候有一隻狗叫做德利。

2. police 警察。
He was the friendliest dog ever, and he was stolen!
他是最友善的狗，而他被偷了。
That's awful! 糟透了!
Yeah, I really wished the police could catch the thief.
對啊，我那時好希望警察能抓到小偷。

3. sell 賣掉。
Maybe Deli just got lost. 也許德利只是迷路。
No, he was a beautiful dog. 不是，他很漂亮。
The thief must have sold him. 小偷一定把他給賣了。

4. bike 腳踏車。
I had a bike that got stolen. 我曾經有腳踏車被偷走。
So what did you do? 結果你怎麼辦?
I had to walk to school! 我得走路上學!

vocabulary.postscript:
今天的單字有哪些?
steal偷竊 police警察 sell賣掉 bike腳踏車

quiz.question: 1. What do thieves do?
2. Where were the chairs stolen from?
3. What did the thieves do with the chairs?

content.en: What is making that noise? Pigeons are! They make noise from early in the morning!
content.tw: 你聽見了嗎？鴿子從一大早就開始發出這些聲音。

content.en: Pigeons make buildings dirty too. Cleaning the buildings is hard. It also costs a lot of money.
content.tw: 鴿糞也會汙染建築物的外觀。清理這些建築物不但很麻煩，還很花錢！

content.en: Many cities have too many pigeons. These birds can find lots of food. So they lay eggs again and again. They can lay twelve eggs a year!
content.tw: 很多城市的鴿子太多了。鴿子在市區可以找到充足的食物，會一直生蛋！一隻鴿子一年可以生十二顆蛋！

content.en: Cities try many ways to make pigeons go away. Some of these ways hurt the birds. One city does not want pigeons. But it does not want to hurt them.
content.tw: 有個城市想趕走鴿子，但不想傷害到牠們。

content.en: The city made a pigeon house. It is in a big park. It has lots of food. Pigeons leave other parts of the city. They eat and rest in the house.
content.tw: 於是人們在這個城市的大公園裡蓋了一間鴿子屋，吸引鴿子從其他地方飛來。

content.en: Pigeons lay eggs there too! But people take the eggs. They give the pigeons fake eggs.
content.tw: 鴿子在那裏吃飽喝足後，就會在鳥屋裡生蛋！人們會把這些蛋拿走，再把假的蛋放回去。

content.en: The birds do not know this. They sit and sit on the eggs. But no baby pigeons come out! So there are fewer and fewer pigeons in the city.
content.tw: 鴿子不知道蛋被掉包，會繼續孵蛋。假的蛋孵不出來，城市中的鴿子數量也就減少了！

content.en: Does your city have too many pigeons? What do you think about using fake eggs?
content.tw: 你的城市有太多鴿子嗎？你覺得使用假蛋怎麼樣？

vocabulary.preface: 這個城市想了個辦法來降低鴿子的數量。

content.text:
1. egg 蛋。
Shhhh … Look! A pigeon is sitting there. 你看，一隻鴿子坐在那裏。
Wow, is it nesting? 哇，牠在抱窩嗎?
Are there eggs? 有沒有蛋?
I can’t see any. 我沒看到蛋。

2. hurt 傷害。
But I think it’s nesting. 不過我想牠是在抱窩。
What should we do? 我們該做什麼?
Try not to hurt the bird, for one thing. 第一點，儘量不要傷害那隻鳥。

3. noise 噪音。
And don’t make too much noise. 也不要弄太多吵鬧聲。
How long do you think it’ll be there? 你覺得牠會待在那裏多久?
Let’s look it up online. 來上網找一下。

4. food 食物。
It says pigeon eggs take 17 to 19 days to hatch.
它說鴿子蛋需要17到19天孵出來。
I wonder how it finds food. 不知道牠怎麼找吃的。

vocabulary.postscript:
今天的單字超簡單。
egg蛋 hurt傷害 noise噪音 food食物

quiz.question: 1. When do pigeons start making noise?
2. What did a city make for pigeons?
3. Why do people take eggs from pigeons?
options: a. To make them lay more eggs
b. To give them fake eggs
c. To sell the eggs to shops

content.en: Tang Cheng-Yao is from Hengchun. She learned how to swim when she was four years old.
content.tw: 來自恆春的唐成瑤從四歲開始就會游泳。

content.en: Now Tang is 98 years old. She cannot see well in one eye. She cannot hear in one ear. But she swims 400 meters almost every day.
content.tw: 現在，唐成瑤已經98歲了！她的視力跟聽力都不好，但她仍然堅持每天游泳四百公尺。

content.en: Tang went to a big swimming contest in Singapore. She was the oldest woman to swim. She swam in five races!
content.tw: 她去參加新加坡一場大型游泳比賽，總共報名五個競賽項目。她是年紀最大的女選手！

content.en: In one race, Tang swam 200 meters. The race was for 95 to 99-year-old women. She finished it! In all the years of this race, she was the fastest! She finished the race in a little under 13 minutes!
content.tw: 其中一場比賽是兩百公尺游泳，參賽者都是95到99歲的女性。她順利游完全程，而且成績是歷年來最快的，只用了不到十三分鐘！

content.en: Tang won five gold medals at the contest. That was very exciting! But something excited her more.
content.tw: 唐成瑤在游泳比賽贏得了五面金牌，但讓她更開心的還有另一件事！

content.en: People from all over the world were at the contest. They know Tang loves swimming. And now they know she has another love too. Tang loves Hengchun! Telling people about her town excited her. She gave them Hengchun bags too.
content.tw: 來自世界各地的人都認識了她，也知道她不只愛游泳，還很愛恆春。她開心的向大家介紹自己的家鄉，並且贈送他們恆春圖案的袋子。

content.en: This 98-year-old winner shared Hengchun with the world!
content.tw: 這位98歲的獲勝者將恆春分享給了全世界！

vocabulary.preface: 九十八歲的老太太，仍然熱愛游泳保持健康。

content.text:
1. contest 比賽。
I may join a swimming contest. 我也許會參加游泳比賽。
How come I never see you go swimming? 我怎麼從來沒看過你去游泳?
That doesn't mean I can't swim. 那並不表示我不會游.

2. meter 公尺。
That's true. 那是真的。
So are you swimming the 100 meters or 200? 所以你要游一百公尺，兩百公尺?
The 100-meter freestyle. 一百公尺自由式.

3. finish 結束。
How fast are you? 你游得多快?
I can finish it in 10 minutes. 我可以十分鐘游完。
I can walk 100 meters in 2 minutes! 我走100公尺只要兩分鐘!

4. gold medal 金牌。
Walking is faster than swimming, okay? 走路比游泳快，好嗎?
And I don't plan to get a gold medal! 而且我又不是要拿金牌!

vocabulary.postscript:
你想參加游泳比賽嗎?
contest 比賽 meter公尺 finish結束 gold medal金牌

quiz.question: 1. How old is Tang?
2. What does Tang do almost every day?
3. What did Tang tell people about?

title: A Beauty Contest for Water Buffalo

content.en: Water buffalo look like very big dark cows. Maybe you have seen them in Taiwan. Do you think they are beautiful? Well, one country has beauty contests for them!
content.tw: 水牛看起來像顏色很深、很大隻的牛。你也許在台灣看過牠們！你覺得水牛漂亮嗎？有一個國家會幫水牛辦選美比賽喔！

content.en: The contests are in Thailand. There are small contests. And there is a big contest at a water buffalo festival every year.
content.tw: 在泰國，有些地方會舉辦小型的水牛選美比賽。也有一年一度的大型水牛節選美大賽！

content.en: At this contest, some water buffalo wear beautiful hats and blankets. Others have colorful skin. Judges look at them. Do they have big horns? Are their feet nice? Are their bodies strong?
content.tw: 在比賽中，有些水牛會戴上漂亮的帽子或是披上毯子，也有一些水牛的皮膚塗上顏色。評審會仔細看這些水牛的犄角大不大？身體強壯嗎？

content.en: Farmers take good care of these water buffalo. Some get a bath every day. They take vitamins. They eat nice food like corn and soybeans. Most other water buffalo eat grass.
content.tw: 農夫平時會細心照顧這些要參賽的水牛，幫他們天天洗澡。跟一般只吃草的水牛不同，要去比賽的水牛會吃維他命、玉米跟黃豆！

content.en: Farmers can sell contest winners for a lot of money. One farmer sold a contest winning buffalo for 18 million Taiwan dollars!
content.tw: 如果水牛在比賽中得獎，就可以賣到很高的價錢。有一位農夫曾經把得獎水牛賣到一千八百萬台幣！

content.en: Long ago, water buffaloes helped farmers. They did a lot of very hard work. Now, machines do this work.
content.tw: 很久以前，水牛會幫農夫耕田。現在，這些辛苦的工作都交給機器了！

content.en: And now there are water buffalo beauty contests!
content.tw: 現在還有水牛選美比賽呢！

vocabulary.preface: 要贏得泰國的水牛選美大賽，很不簡單。

content.text:
1. winner 贏家.
Guess which country is the biggest winner in beauty contests.
猜猜哪個國家是選美比賽最大贏家。
The United States? 是美國嗎?
No, it’s Venezuela. 不對，是委內瑞拉。

2. beautiful 美麗的.
I don’t know where it is. 我不知道它在哪裡?
It’s in South America. 在南美洲。
So the contest is about being the most beautiful? 所以選美比賽是看誰最漂亮?
I don’t know. 我也不知道。

3. take care of 照顧.
But I think being beautiful means taking care of your health.
不過我覺得好好照顧自己的健康就是美。
I do. 我都有喔。

4. every day 每天.
I eat well every day, and I take vitamins. 我每天都吃得很好，也吃維他命。

vocabulary.postscript: winner贏家 beautiful美麗的 take care of照顧 every day每天

quiz.question: 1. Where is the beauty contest?
2. How much did a farmer sell a contest winner for?
3. Who did the water buffalo help long ago?

content.en: Everyone likes to see famous people. We see pictures and videos of them. They are everywhere! Some people see a famous person in real life. How exciting … Maybe they see Taylor Swift at their supermarket!!
content.tw: 通常大家都喜歡巧遇只在照片和影片裡面出現的名人。假如在真實生活中碰到，多半會很興奮！泰勒絲的粉絲假如在超市看到她，一定會尖叫。

content.en: A DJ was playing loud music at a club. It was dark. Many people were dancing. They were having fun!
content.tw: 一家暗暗的夜店正在大聲放音樂，很多人開心跳舞。

content.en: A man came in. He was wearing sunglasses and a big hoodie. His clothes were like Justin Bieber's clothes. His tattoos were like Justin Bieber's tattoos. Hey! Was he Justin Bieber?!
content.tw: 這時，一名男子走了進來。他戴著太陽眼鏡，穿著寬鬆的帽Ｔ。他的穿著跟身上的刺青都跟小賈斯汀一模一樣！他不會是小賈斯汀吧？

content.en: The man’s friends said he was Justin Bieber! They said he wanted to sing a song. Yes! The DJ was excited!
content.tw: 那名男子的朋友說他就是小賈斯汀，還說他想演唱一首歌！夜店的DJ 好興奮！

content.en: The man sang a song called "Sorry." He sang like Justin Bieber. He moved like Justin Bieber. Wow! People took pictures and videos. They were seeing a famous person in real life!
content.tw: 那名男子唱了小賈斯汀的〈Sorry〉。他聲音就像本人一樣，而且連表演時的動作都一樣。大家紛紛拿出手機拍照。

content.en: But later, the DJ got bad news. The man was not Justin Bieber! He was a fake Justin Bieber!
content.tw: 後來，DJ 聽到壞消息。那個男子根本不是小賈斯汀，而是假扮的小「假」斯汀！

content.en: Will this fake Justin Bieber say "Sorry" to the DJ?
content.tw: 這位冒牌小賈斯汀會對DJ說「對不起」嗎？

vocabulary.preface: 撲朔迷離的小賈斯汀，讓人真假分不清。

content.text:
1. sing 唱歌，dance 跳舞。
Are you going to the club tonight? 你今晚要去夜店嗎?
I am. How can I miss the singing and dancing? 要啊，我怎麼會錯過唱歌跳舞?

2) music 音樂。
And the good food. 還有美食。
Exactly 正是。
I’ll bring earplugs too. 我也會帶耳塞。
The music can be very loud! 音樂有可能太吵。
Good idea! 好主意。

3) sunglasses 太陽眼鏡。
I also plan to wear sunglasses, to look cool. 我也打算戴太陽眼鏡，看起來才酷。
So people might think you’re a secret star? 這樣大家就會以為你是祕密明星?
Yeah. 是。

4) picture 照片。
Just don’t trip when you’re dancing; the picture won’t look cool.
可別在跳舞時絆倒，相片就不酷了。

vocabulary.postscript:
來一起來讀單字。
Sing 唱歌 dance 跳舞 music 音樂 sunglasses 太陽眼鏡 picture照片

quiz.question: 1. Where was everyone dancing?
2. What was the man wearing?
options: b. Sunglasses and a big hoodie

quiz.question: 3. Who said the man was Justin Bieber?

title: Doing Something New Is Easier with Help

content.en: Do you want to do something new? Sometimes it is hard to do new things. It is easier to do new things with help at first.
content.tw: 你想嘗試新的活動嗎？有時候想做點新鮮事並不容易，假如有人在幫忙就會輕鬆很多。

content.en: Some older adults wanted to do something new. But they needed help. So high school students in Yunlin helped them!
content.tw: 在雲林，有一些長者也想嘗試新東西，但他們需要協助，於是一群高中生來幫忙！

content.en: The students know how to make videos with AI. They helped the adults make many AI videos. Everyone had lots of fun!
content.tw: 這些學生一步一步教大人怎麼用 AI 做影片！

content.en: One man had always wanted to dance on stage. But he cannot dance. In his video, he danced in a big dance contest. Watching the video made him happy.
content.tw: 一名不會跳舞的男子一直夢想在舞台上大展身手！他做的AI 影片，讓他終於能夠參加舞蹈比賽，讓他非常高興！

content.en: Other adults made rap music videos! Using AI, they rapped in English in their videos. Others danced with K-pop dancers in their videos!
content.tw: 還有一些人做了饒舌音樂影片，用英文唱饒舌歌，也有人選擇跟K-pop 舞者一起跳舞。

content.en: Some adults had wild animals in their videos. One walked with tigers! Do not try this in real life!
content.tw: 還有人甚至在影片裡跟老虎一起散步！當然，在現實生活千萬不要這麼做!

content.en: Thanks to the students, more people can use AI now. Do you know how to do something others want to do? Would you like to help someone too?
content.tw: 多虧了這些學生，現在有更多人可以使用人工智慧了。你知道如何做別人想做的事情嗎？你也會想幫助別人嗎？

vocabulary.preface: AI的用途廣泛，讓很多年紀較大的長者躍躍欲試，但是他們需要幫忙。

content.text: 1. how 如何。 Can you show me how to make videos using AI? 你可以教我怎麼用AI作影片嗎? I thought you'd never ask. 我以為你永遠不會問呢。
2. easier 更容易的。 It's actually quite easy. 其實滿簡單的。 With your help, I bet it'll be even easier. 有你幫忙，我打賭一定更簡單。Oh, trying to butter me up? 嘴巴這麼甜喔?
3. student 學生。 So what would you like to make? 所以你想做什麼呢? I want the video to show me singing with Taylor Swift. 影片裡要有我跟泰勒絲合唱。 Wow, for your students? 哇，給你的學生看嗎? Yeah.對。
4. fun 樂趣。 That would be lots of fun. 那會滿好玩的。 I think so too! 我也覺得!

vocabulary.postscript: 今天你學到哪些單字? how如何 easier更容易的 student學生 fun樂趣

quiz.question: 1. Where do the students go to high school?
2. Who helped people make AI videos?
3. Which wild animals were in a video?

title: Singapore Has Too Much Trash Ash

content.en: Every country has too much trash. Singapore does too. Singapore is very small. Fifty-two Singapores can go into Taiwan! And it has more than six million people. There is almost no space for trash!
content.tw: 垃圾問題讓很多國家頭痛，新加坡也不例外。新加坡是個小國家，卻有六百萬人口，實在沒有地方放垃圾。

content.en: Many countries burn trash to make electricity. Singapore does this with four plants. It is number five in the world! Four countries make more electricity with trash. But they do this with many more plants.
content.tw: 有一些國家用焚燒垃圾來發電，新加坡就有四座這樣的焚化爐，並且很有效率，雖然數量比別的國家少，發電量卻很高。

content.en: Burning makes trash smaller. In Singapore, nineteen million kilograms of trash becomes two million kilograms of ash each day.
content.tw: 焚化垃圾可以讓它的體積大為縮減，新加坡每天一千九百萬公斤的垃圾焚化之後，只剩下兩百萬公斤的灰。

content.en: Countries put trash and ash into landfills. Singapore has one landfill. It is for ash. But it will be full in nine years. Now Singapore wants to find ways to use ash.
content.tw: 也有的國家用掩埋法來處理垃圾跟灰燼，新加坡也這樣做，不過它只有一個掩埋場，再過九年就要滿了。它必須想別的辦法來處理垃圾焚化之後產生的灰。

content.en: But Singapore has more and more trash every year. Experts say its people and companies need to make less trash. That can help a lot.
content.tw: 專家說勸導人們減少垃圾的數量也是一個可行的辦法。

content.en: Taiwan makes electricity from trash too. But we also make too much trash. Our landfills are also getting full. Let's all make less trash!
content.tw: 台灣也從垃圾中發電。但我們也製造了太多的垃圾。我們的垃圾掩埋場也快滿了。讓我們大家一起減少垃圾吧！

vocabulary.preface: 新加坡正在努力想辦法，解決越來越嚴重的垃圾問題。

content.text: 1. less 較少的。The newspaper says we have much less trash these days.報紙說我們現在的垃圾比以前少很多。Really? Compared to 100 years ago? 真的嗎，跟一百年前比嗎?People are trying to cut waste. 大家在減少廢物。
2. country 國家。But look at all those fast-fashion stores. 但是妳看那些快時尚商店。They are in many countries, 好多國家都有，and people just buy things and throw them away. 大家就一直買，然後扔掉。
3. kilogram 公斤。Didn't you just buy 9 shirts yesterday? 你不是昨天才買九件襯衫?Hey, I gained 7 kilograms! 我胖了七公斤! What can I do? 能怎麼辦?
4. need 需要。All you need to do is cut down on French fries and ice cream.你只需要少吃薯條跟冰淇淋就可以了。

vocabulary.postscript: 這些單字很有用喔。less較少的 country國家 kilogram公斤 need需要

quiz.question: 1. How many plants burn trash to make electricity in Singapore?
2. What does Singapore put in its landfill?
3. What do experts say people and companies need to do?
